rationale: Bug hunt C15 found HIGH severity bug: double reward application. StoreRun.handle_run_end() already applies rewards during RESOLVE_CHOICE dispatch, but game_controller_effects.apply_run_rewards() was called AGAIN at L666 of merlin_game_controller.gd. Result: 2x Anam, 2x total_runs, 2x run_history entries, 2x biome_runs. Fix: removed duplicate call. Feature: echo_memory data (populated in C15) was sitting unused by the LLM. Now wired into build_narrative_context() with tension_zone and convergence_zone from MOS. build_context_enrichment() formats cross-run death memory and veteran status into prompt enrichment for Merlin's narrative callbacks.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C16 (merlin_llm_adapter.gd + llm_adapter_prompts.gd echo memory code). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011) or few-shot JSON GM examples (q-20260415-005, creator chose B: 3 examples with end-game).
